organisation.meta_desc: Discover the structure, leadership, and departments of Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi.
organisation.hero_subtitle: Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi is organised around strong spiritual leadership and departments dedicated to each area of ministry.
organisation.leadership_subtitle: Consecrated men and women, called to lead God's people with integrity and faithfulness.
organisation.departements_subtitle: Each department is a full ministry with its own vision, team, and specific mission.
organisation.fonctionnement_subtitle: The church is governed according to biblical principles, with a clear separation of responsibilities.

fonctionnement_items.desc: Doctrinal and pastoral decisions rest with the Apostle and the Elders.
Each department leader reports directly to the Lead Pastor.
Active members participate in important decisions of church life.
Finances are managed by a management committee under pastoral supervision.

apropos.meta_desc: Discover the history, mission, vision and values of Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi.
apropos.hero_subtitle: A community founded on the sound doctrine of the Lord Jesus Christ — forming, transforming, loving and living by faith.
apropos.apotre_bio1: Pastor Paulin Mambwe is the senior pastor of the local Church of Bel-Air Fizi. Driven by a deep passion for God's Word and the making of disciples, he has dedicated his life to building up the Body of Christ.
apropos.apotre_bio2: Under his spiritual leadership, the church has experienced remarkable growth, gathering more than 2,000 members today, and has contributed to the planting of several assemblies in the Democratic Republic of Congo and abroad.
apropos.histoire_p1: The local Church of Bel Air Fizi was born following a biblical conference organized by the School of Bible Readers. Before its official inauguration on November 13, 2016, it operated as a prayer cell bringing together two families driven by the desire to serve God and make Jesus Christ known.
apropos.histoire_p2: Over the years, the work has continued to grow under the leadership of Apostle Paulin Mambwe, evolving from a small group of believers into a dynamic community of more than 2,000 members today. Committed to evangelism, disciple-making and church planting, it has contributed to the establishment of several assemblies in the Democratic Republic of Congo and abroad.
apropos.histoire_p3: Through the teaching of God's Word, prayer, and the nurturing of children, youth and families, the Church continues its mission to form accomplished disciples of Jesus Christ and to proclaim the Gospel to the ends of the earth.
apropos.contact_subtitle: A question, a prayer request, or would you like to visit us? We are here for you.
apropos.cta_subtitle: Come and experience Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi.

hero.title: Welcome to Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi
hero.subtitle: A church grounded in the sound doctrine of the Lord Jesus Christ — a community that forms, transforms, loves and lives by faith.
hero.quote: Christ in us, the hope of glory.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To form a generation of disciples deeply rooted in the Word of God, fervent in prayer, and committed to faithfully living and proclaiming the doctrine of Jesus Christ to all nations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: What we do
items: Teach the doctrine of Jesus abundantly
Lead every child of God to a daily and consistent reading of the Bible
Develop a culture of intense and constant prayer
Send disciples to evangelize and plant churches

testimonialsCta.title: God is still at work today.
testimonialsCta.body: Discover how lives have been transformed by the power of Jesus Christ.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Relive the memorable moments of our community

items.texte: Since joining this community, my life has been transformed. The Word of God is taught with clarity and depth. I truly feel at home here.
I found a sincere spiritual family here. The moments of prayer and intercession helped me go through difficult trials with the strength of God.
Camp de Jésus Bel-Air helped me grow in my faith. The teachings are practical, rooted in the Bible and applicable to daily life.
God healed me here — not just physically, but inwardly. This church truly believes in the power of the Holy Spirit and it shows.
As a young person, I found real spiritual guidance here. The youth department taught me to walk with God from an early age.
My marriage was going through a deep crisis. Thanks to pastoral support and the church's prayers, we found unity and peace in our home again.
I had been enslaved to alcohol for years. The day I accepted Christ in this church, my life radically changed. Today I am free.
The worship choir helped me discover my gift and serve God with joy. This is where I understood my calling.

adhesion.meta_desc: Become a member of Camp de Jésus-Christ Bel-Air Fizi. Discover the criteria, process and commitments of membership.
adhesion.hero_title: Join the family of Camp de Jésus-Christ
adhesion.hero_subtitle: Membership is a decisive step in your walk with God. It commits you to a shared community, vision and mission.

benefits.title: A spiritual family
benefits.desc: Be surrounded by brothers and sisters committed to the same faith and sharing the same vision.

benefits.title: Pastoral support
benefits.desc: Benefit from the guidance of the senior pastor and the church elders.

benefits.title: Active service
benefits.desc: Participate in the life of the church through its departments and ministries.

benefits.title: Ongoing training
benefits.desc: Access in-depth teachings, seminars and biblical training programs.

adhesion.criteria_subtitle: There are no particular requirements to join our family. The door is open to all.

steps.title: Attend services
steps.desc: Start by regularly attending Sunday services and the weekly activities of the church.

steps.title: Integration course
steps.desc: Complete the integration course organized to better understand the church's vision, doctrine and structure.

steps.title: Pastoral interview
steps.desc: Meet with the pastor or an elder for a follow-up and spiritual guidance interview.

steps.title: Formal commitment
steps.desc: Fill in your membership form and officially join the family of Camp de Jésus-Christ.

commitments: Faithfully attend church services and activities
Support the church through prayer and tithing
Live according to the church's values and doctrine
Actively serve in a department or ministry
Contribute to the unity and growth of the community
adhesion.cta_subtitle: Contact us to learn more or to register for the next integration course.

lectureBibliquePage.meta_desc: Read through the entire Bible at your own pace with the Camp de Jésus-Christ reading guide.
lectureBibliquePage.hero_title: Read the Bible at your own pace
lectureBibliquePage.hero_subtitle: A simple and progressive method to read through the entire Bible at your own reading pace.
lectureBibliquePage.guide_desc: This method consists of reading the books of the Bible in column order, fully completing one book before moving to the next.
lectureBibliquePage.plan_afternoon: during the rest of the day
lectureBibliquePage.reading_afternoon: Reading for the rest of the day
lectureBibliquePage.reading_done_all: Well done! Today's reading is complete.
lectureBibliquePage.reading_bible_done: You have finished the entire Bible!
lectureBibliquePage.reading_no_plan: Select a plan to get started.
lectureBibliquePage.catchup_suggestion: Read {n} extra chapter(s) per day for 4 days to catch up.
lectureBibliquePage.share_msg_footer: I follow the Bible reading program of Camp de Jésus-Christ.
